steps.title: Find the key clue in the sentence
steps.content: The sentence says waves damage structures, and then — "in turn— repairs may alter local wave patterns. "In turn" signals a back-and-forth cycle: each side causes change in the other. The blank must name that mutual, two-way influence.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
Substitute each word into the blank: "exemplify the ______ between marine structures and ocean forces."
  • Choice A — 'interplay': Interplay means reciprocal action or influence between two things — exactly the back-and-forth cycle the sentence describes. ✓
  • Choice B — 'tension': Tension means strain or conflict, not a productive two-way cycle of cause and effect. ✗
  • Choice C — 'incongruity': Incongruity means a mismatch or incompatibility, not mutual influence. ✗
  • Choice D — 'continuum': Continuum means a gradual scale or sequence, not reciprocal causation between two distinct agents. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
